 {org.clojure/tools.reader {:mvn/version "1.1.1"}
  io.github.sally/awesome {:git/tag "v1.2.3" :git/sha "123abcd"}

         :default-deps {org.clojure/core.cache {:mvn/version "1.1.234"}}}}}
